# To the Sea, to the Sea! ◆

> [!info] 💧 Attachment · Cost: **1** · Spirit

*Song.*

---

Attach to a **_Noldor_** character.
**Action:** Exhaust To the Sea, to the Sea! and discard X cards from your hand to reduce the cost of the next **_Noldor_** ally played this phase by X (to a minimum of 1).
